zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Conyers於1275年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾赫頓時，他的父親John Conyers Lord Sockburn38歲，母親Scolastica Lady de Cotham25歲。他於大約1293年與Alice II de Mowbray在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟斯克結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1320年在英國越可爾赫頓享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Conyers was born in 1275, in Hutton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Conyers Lord Sockburn, was 38 and his mother, Scolastica Lady de Cotham, was 25. He married Alice II de Mowbray about 1293, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1320, in Hutton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Conyers est né en 1275, à Hutton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Conyers Lord Sockburn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Scolastica Lady de Cotham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice II de Mowbray environ 1293, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1320, à Hutton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Conyersが1275年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父John Conyers Lord Sockburnは38歳，母Scolastica Lady de Cothamは25歳であった。約1293年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスイルスクでAlice II de Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハットオンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Conyers(이)가 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Conyers Lord Sockburn(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Scolastica Lady de Cotham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1293년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 Alice II de Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 요르크실르 후턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Conyers родился в 1275 г. в местности хуттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Conyers Lord Sockburn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Scolastica Lady de Cotham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice II de Mowbray около 1293 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности хуттон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
